UNDERLYING_MECHANISM.strongest_support: Coherent charity-bound migration receipt; supply-safe pro-rata; not unconditionally self-defeating under narrow scope
UNDERLYING_MECHANISM.strongest_counterevidence: Transferable float + identity-free anti-whale formulas fail or amplify risk; rebate/tainted residuals
falsifiers: Continuation impossible even under non-transferable defaults

TRANSFERABILITY_NECESSITY.strongest_support: Non-transferable receipt serves F1-F4; design pack does not require alienable units
TRANSFERABILITY_NECESSITY.strongest_counterevidence: Unspecified future ledger functions may want transferable units
falsifiers: Binding v1 function requiring transferability with no alternative

EVIDENCE_STATE.strongest_support: Independent math/probes decide CONTINUE_WITH_CONDITIONS vs gate pass vs mainnet
EVIDENCE_STATE.strongest_counterevidence: Empirical alpha/v/participation open (not required for bounded research decision)
assumptions: Bounded decision is research disposition not launch
falsifiers: Material counterexample to supply or Sybil results
EVIDENCE_STATE.exact_next_action: Product lock without waiting for denser simulation

REAL_WORLD_READINESS.strongest_support: Synthetic crypto, no live funds, legal/AML open

conditions: Specify target ledger functions before defending transferability
Prefer non-transferable or delayed-transfer if float not required
Do not attach majority governance to raw allocation without durable constraints
Do not advertise concave/cap as permissionless fairness without identity
Treat rebate and tainted-title as residual social/legal surfaces
No live funds, solicitation, token issuance, or STATUS promotion from this audit
